Uses of Annotation Interface
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.annotation.CheckReturnValue

Packages that use CheckReturnValue
Package
Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of Guava types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.jackson
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of Jackson types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
 
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.type
 
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.type.part

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Configuration
    DefaultGuavaValidators.configuration()
    Returns the configuration used by new validators.
    static GlobalConfiguration
    DefaultGuavaValidators.globalConfiguration()
    Returns the global configuration shared by all validators.
    static ConfigurationUpdater
    DefaultGuavaValidators.updateConfiguration()
    Updates the configuration used by new validators.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    ConfigurationUpdater.cleanStackTrace()
    Returns true if this library should be excluded from exception stack traces, except when that also removes user code.
    static Configuration
    DefaultJavaValidators.configuration()
    Returns the configuration used by new validators.
    Configuration
    Validators.configuration()
    Returns the configuration used by new validators.
    JavaValidators
    JavaValidators.copy()
    Returns a new factory instance with an independent configuration.
    S
    Validators.copy()
    Returns a new factory instance with an independent configuration.
    EqualityMethod
    ConfigurationUpdater.equalityMethod()
    Returns the equality method that determines whether two values are equivalent.
    Function<Throwable,? extends Throwable>
    ConfigurationUpdater.exceptionTransformer()
    Returns a function that transforms the validation exception into a suitable runtime exception or error.
    static MutableStringMappers
    MutableStringMappers.from(StringMappers mappers)
    Returns a mutable copy of the StringMappers.
    static GlobalConfiguration
    DefaultJavaValidators.globalConfiguration()
    Returns the global configuration shared by all validators.
    GlobalConfiguration
    Validators.globalConfiguration()
    Returns the global configuration shared by all validators.
    boolean
    ConfigurationUpdater.includeDiff()
    Returns true if exception messages should include a diff that compares actual and expected values if they are too long.
    MutableStringMappers
    ConfigurationUpdater.stringMappers()
    Returns the configuration used to map contextual values to a String.
    StringMappers
    MutableStringMappers.toImmutable()
    Returns an immutable copy of the mapper configuration.
    static ConfigurationUpdater
    DefaultJavaValidators.updateConfiguration()
    Updates the configuration used by new validators.
    ConfigurationUpdater
    Validators.updateConfiguration()
    Updates the configuration used by new validators.
